chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1066 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.4436/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.08.2023 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- According to learned AAG Sindh and Additional P.G., Crime No.49 of 2023 of Police Station Ahmedpur, District Khairpur registered for offence under Section 394, P.P.C. was disposed of in ‘B’ class by Investigating Officer, but learned Magistrate has disagreed with him and has taken cognizance. In view of above, learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition and states that he will challenge the order of learned Magistrate in appropriate proceedings. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
